component.name: Bottom Sheet: Choose Session
component.description: Session flows: attach/detach job notes (featured row + optional divider + job list), pick a session from a list, or create a session type (live vs log past).

variants.newAttachmentForSession: Title “New Note”; note featured row `Semantic/Activity/Note` + well + `QuickCaptureTileIcon` newNote; divider “or attach to SESSION”; `RowCard` simpleJob list.
variants.removeEditFromSession: Title “Edit Session”; error featured row `Semantic/Status/Error/BG`; divider “ATTACH TO DIFFERENT SESSION”; list.
variants.newSessionType: Title “New Session”; stacked rows: `Brand/Primary` “Live Session” (`QuickCaptureTileIcon` startSession) and `Semantic/Status/Neutral/BG` + `Foundation/Text/Primary` border “Log Past Session” (pencil well on `Foundation/Text/Secondary`); no list.

notes: 2026-04-07: Variants renamed to match Figma property labels (incl. New Session Type `1286:602`). Code enum uses camelCase `newAttachmentForSession`, `removeEditFromSession`, `newSessionType`.
